channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 Spotui/Spotui (199 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Spotui

📝 Repository: Spotui/Spotui

📄 Descrizione: Spotify clone with deep integration

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-09T05:26:44Z

]]>

item.title: 📝 zepto-labs/react-native-delta (88 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: zepto-labs

📝 Repository: zepto-labs/react-native-delta

📄 Descrizione: The React Native runtime that downloads and applies lightweight delta patches instead of replacing entire bundles. Built for seamless, secure, and production-ready updates with dramatically smaller downloads 🚀.

🍴 Forks: 10

📜 Licenza: Other

item.title: 📝 ITSDevelopmentCore/hypervault-crypto (50 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ITSDevelopmentCore

📝 Repository: ITSDevelopmentCore/hypervault-crypto

📄 Descrizione: Offline cryptographic core of Hypervault: Argon2id, HKDF, AES-256-GCM, HV1 vault format, BIP-32/39, SLIP-10, air-gapped signing. Pure Kotlin, single dependency (Bouncy Castle).

⭐ Stelle: 50

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: aes-gcm air-gapped argon2id bip32 bip39 cryptography kotlin offline-first password-manager security

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-05T23:22:33Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-09T05:20:55Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 jjrodcast/TextKit (14 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jjrodcast

📝 Repository: jjrodcast/TextKit

📄 Descrizione: A rich text editor engine for Compose Multiplatform, targeting Android, iOS, Web (Wasm/JS), and Desktop (JVM). Built on a rope-backed piece-table architecture for efficient O(log n) text editing, it supports formatting (bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, highlight), links, colors, headings, ordered/bullet/task lists, and blockquotes.

⭐ Stelle: 14

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: compose-multiplatform rich-text-editor

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-12T19:21:56Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-18T03:43:24Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
